title: Amazon Basics 18-Piece Dinnerware Set - Modern Beams, Service for 6, 17 cm, 19 cm, 24.4 cm
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: 18-piece dinnerware set; service for 6; includes 6 each: 24.4 cm dinner plate, 19 cm salad plate, and 17 cm bowl
AB-grade porcelain for everyday use; lightweight yet durable
Elegant modern design for easy coordinating with existing tableware and décor
Suitable for dishwasher, freezer-safe, and microwave-safe; plates can withstand heat up to 300°C
description: From the manufacturer AmazonBasics 18-Piece Dinnerware Set Service for 6 Bring an elegant sense of contemporary style to the kitchen, dining room, or even the breakfast nook with this everyday AmazonBasics dinnerware set. A nice choice for family meals and casual gatherings, the 18-piece set includes six place settings, each with a dinner plate, salad plate, and bowl. Includes 6 of each: - 24.4-cm dinner plate - 19-cm salad plate - 17-cm bowl Details AB-grade porcelain Lightweight yet durable Stylish design Microwave- and freezer-safe Dishwasher-safe for easy cleaning Plates can withstand a max temp of 300 degrees C High-Quality Porcelain for Everyday Use Made of AB-grade porcelain, the high-quality dinnerware set offers reliable strength and durability, as well as a lightweight design for easy handling. The porcelain dinnerware set makes a great alternative to plastic dishes. The set can be safely used in the freezer and in the microwave, though be careful, as the plates will get hot. The plates can withstand a maximum temperature of 300 degrees C. What's more, the everyday 18-piece dinnerware set can go in the dishwasher, making cleanup a snap. Contemporary Style The set's sleek modern design tastefully layers together and makes a beautiful addition to existing dinnerware pieces, table linen, and surrounding decor.
